pages.text: Foxy Joxy was a sly fox. He sold big, fresh watermelons. Watermelons for sale! 500

blocks.text: Foxy Joxy was a sly fox.

pages.text: “Your price is too high,” said Rabbit Jabbit. “You are asking too much,” said Gia Giraffe.

blocks.text: “Your price is too high,” said Rabbit Jabbit.
“You are asking too much,” said Gia Giraffe.

pages.text: Foxy Joxy had a clever idea.

blocks.text: Foxy Joxy had a clever idea.

pages.text: He slit open a big watermelon, scooped out the fruit, and gobbled it up.

blocks.text: He slit open a big watermelon, scooped out the fruit, and gobbled it up.

pages.text: Then he filled it with water! He took a needle and thread and sewed the watermelon back together.

blocks.text: Then he filled it with water!
He took a needle and thread and sewed the watermelon back together.

pages.text: He sold his water melons for a cheap price. Many animals bought from Foxy Joxy.

blocks.text: He sold his water melons for a cheap price.
Many animals bought from Foxy Joxy.

pages.text: “This watermelon has only water in it,” complained Funky Monkey.

blocks.text: “This watermelon has only water in it,” complained Funky Monkey.

pages.text: “Well, you got what you paid for,” said Foxy Joxy.

blocks.text: “Well, you got what you paid for,” said Foxy Joxy.

pages.text: “We need to teach Foxy Joxy a lesson,” said Ellie Elephant.

blocks.text: “We need to teach Foxy Joxy a lesson,” said Ellie Elephant.

pages.text: The animals gathered around and came up with a plan. “I have an idea,” said Oliver Owl.

blocks.text: The animals gathered around and came up with a plan.
“I have an idea,” said Oliver Owl.

pages.text: They took an empty watermelon, stuffed Foxy Joxy into it and played a game of football with it.

blocks.text: They took an empty watermelon, stuffed Foxy Joxy into it and played a game of football with it.

pages.text: Foxy Joxy was dizzy! He learnt his lesson and never cheated again.

blocks.text: He learnt his lesson and never cheated again.
